setup.en: Create the sole admin account. Once complete, the setup entry will be permanently closed.
setup.zh-CN: 创建唯一管理员账号。完成后初始化入口将永久关闭。

login.en: Sign in to manage domains, config versions, and deployment tasks.
login.zh-CN: 登录后管理域名、配置版本和发布任务。

usernameDescription.en: Use lowercase letters, numbers, dots, underscores, or hyphens.
usernameDescription.zh-CN: 使用小写字母、数字、点、下划线或连字符。

rememberDescription.en: Extend the session on this device per the instance security policy.
rememberDescription.zh-CN: 按实例安全策略延长此设备的会话。

apiConnectFailed.en: Unable to connect to management API

passwordMismatch.zh-CN: 两次输入的密码不一致
